MovieTitle.description: A catchy title for the celebrity then-and-now video (3-8 words).

MusicPrompt.description: Prompt for generating background music that fits the nostalgic, transformative theme of the video.

Characters.description: Array of character details, one per celebrity. Order matches the input images.

CharacterName.description: The celebrity's name or a descriptive label.

ThenImagePrompt.description: Prompt to transform the user-provided young/then photo into a consistent scene within the setting environment. Should instruct the AI to place the young person in the setting while preserving their identity and facial features.

NowImagePrompt.description: Prompt to transform the user-provided current/now photo into a consistent scene within the setting environment. Should instruct the AI to place the current person in the setting while preserving their identity and facial features.

TogetherImagePrompt.description: Prompt to compose both the then and current versions of the celebrity together in the setting. The AI image editor receives the consistent then image as SourceImages[0] and the consistent now image as SourceImages[1]. Describe their pose and leave enough negative space for a later camera pull-back to an empty scene.

MeetingVideoPrompt.description: Video prompt for the meeting segment. The clip starts on the empty setting, the then version enters first, the current version approaches, and they come together in frame. Describe specific camera movements. Start frame: empty setting image. End frame: together image.

TransitionVideoPrompt.description: Video prompt for the exit transition segment. Camera moves away from the pair as they leave and settles on an empty part of the same setting so the next segment can begin seamlessly. Start frame: together image. End frame: empty setting image.
